subcodes.first_line: How many of the prophets longed to be here in these days of God. Many Germans left their homeland and settled here on this mountain, where they awaited the arrival of the Promised One
subcodes.subjects: @Mount Carmel, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @prophecy and fulfillment, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @rejection of Muhammad, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul
